elements.name: Success Criterion 1
elements.text: Better planning of IT systems purchasing and life cycle

elements.name: Rule 1
elements.text: A System must have a business owner before it becomes Active.

elements.name: Rule 2
elements.text: A System lifecycle state change requires approval for deprecation.

elements.name: Rule 3
elements.text: A System must record vendor and contract dates.
